source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
At time \( t = 0 \), a red car and a blue car are both located at \( x = 0 \), with the red car travelling at a constant speed \( v \) along the positive \( x \)-axis and the blue car at rest and just beginning to accelerate along a path parallel to the red car. The velocity of both cars from time \( 0 \) to \( 2t \) is graphed above. At time \( t \):
<image_1>
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: both cars have traveled the same distance, and the blue car has a greater instantaneous velocity

choice_map.A: the blue car has traveled farther, and both cars have the same instantaneous velocity
choice_map.B: both cars have traveled the same distance, and the blue car has a greater instantaneous velocity
choice_map.C: the red car has traveled farther, and both cars have the same instantaneous velocity
choice_map.D: both cars have traveled the same distance, and both cars have the same instantaneous velocity
choice_map.E: the blue car has traveled farther, and the blue car has a greater instantaneous velocity

multi_step: the answer requires determining distance traveled by each car at time t, which depends on interpreting area under each velocity-time curve
the answer also requires comparing instantaneous velocities at time t from the graph
the selected option is a conjunction of two claims, so solving needs at least two comparisons
verifiability: multiple-choice options are provided, and the answer text matches one specific option statement
the target claims are concrete: relative distance traveled and relative instantaneous velocity at time t
registry_passed=true and an image asset exists, so the sample is sufficiently grounded for later checking
